title: Juliette Kayyem on Office Hours Podcast
summary: Juliette Kayyem (@juliettekayyem), Lecturer in Public Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and former Assistant Secretary for Intergovernmental Affairs at the Department of Homeland Security, sits down with Aroop Mukharji (@aroopmukharji) to talk about everything from safeguarding mega events to safeguarding your home and family.
body: Juliette Kayyem has spent over 15 years managing complex policy initiatives and organizing government responses to major crises in both state and federal government. She is the founder of Kayyem Solutions, LLC , providing strategic advice in technology, risk management, mega-event planning and cybersecurity. Clients comprise a range of companies including Airbnb, Rave Mobile Safety, and the International Centre for Sport Security. Juliette is currently the Belfer Lecturer in International Security at Harvard Kennedy School and an on-air security analyst for CNN. She also hosts a regular podcast entitled The SCIF for WGBH, Boston’s local NPR station, and her newest book, S ecurity Mom: An Unclassified Guide to Protecting Our Homeland and Your Home , was published in 2016. _list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: Juliette Kayyem is a security expert with over 15 years of experience managing complex policy initiatives and government crisis responses. She founded Kayyem Solutions, LLC, a firm providing strategic advice in technology, risk management, mega-event planning, and cybersecurity to clients such as Airbnb and the International Centre for Sport Security. Academically, she serves as the Belfer Lecturer in International Security at Harvard Kennedy School. Her public roles include being a CNN on-air security analyst and hosting the podcast 'The SCIF' for WGBH. Her 2016 book, 'Security Mom: An Unclassified Guide to Protecting Our Homeland and Your Home,' reflects her focus on bridging national and domestic security concerns.
result.main_content_zh: 朱丽叶特·凯耶姆是一位拥有超过15年经验的安全专家，擅长管理复杂的政策倡议和政府重大危机应对工作。她创立了凯耶姆解决方案有限责任公司，为包括爱彼迎和国际体育安全中心在内的客户提供技术、风险管理、大型活动规划和网络安全方面的战略咨询。在学术界，她担任哈佛大学肯尼迪学院的贝尔弗国际安全讲师。她的公众角色包括担任美国有线电视新闻网的安全分析评论员，以及为波士顿公共广播电台WGBH主持播客节目“The SCIF”。她于2016年出版的著作《安全妈妈：保护我们的国土与家园的非机密指南》体现了她连接国家安全与家庭安全关切的关注点。
